title: Mortal Kombat II | Official Trailer II
description:
The wait is almost over! Mortal Kombat II arrives in theaters and IMAX May 8. #MortalKombatMovie #FilmedForIMAX

From New Line Cinema comes the latest high-stakes installment in the blockbuster video game franchise in all its brutal glory, Mortal Kombat II. This time, the fan favorite champions—now joined by Johnny Cage himself—are pitted against one another in the ultimate, no-holds barred, gory battle to defeat the dark rule of Shao Kahn that threatens the very existence of the Earthrealm and its defenders.

Karl Urban stars as Johnny Cage, alongside Adeline Rudolph, Jessica McNamee, Josh Lawson, Ludi Lin, Mehcad Brooks, Tati Gabrielle, Lewis Tan, Damon Herriman, with Chin Han, Tadanobu Asano as Lord Raiden, Joe Taslim as Bi-Han, and Hiroyuki Sanada as Hanzo Hasashi and Scorpion.

Director Simon McQuoid returns to helm the follow up to his explosive 2021cinematic adventure, from a screenplay by Jeremy Slater, based on the videogame created by Ed Boon and John Tobias. The film is produced by Todd Garner, E. Bennett Walsh, James Wan, Toby Emmerich and Simon McQuoid, and executive produced by Michael Clear, Judson Scott, Jeremy Slater, Ed Boon and Lawrence Kasanoff.

Joining McQuoid behind the camera are director of photography Stephen F. Windon, production designer Yohei Taneda, editor Stuart Levy and costume designer Cappi Ireland, with casting by Rich Delia and music by Benjamin Wallfisch. 

New Line Cinema Presents an Atomic Monster/Broken Road Production, a Fireside Films Production, Mortal Kombat II. The film will be distributed worldwide by Warner Bros. Pictures, only in theaters and IMAX® across North America on May 8, 2026, and internationally beginning 6 May 2026.

description:
Become a living weapon. As he searches for answers about his past, Wolverine will do whatever it takes – unleashing brutal claw combat, violent rage, and relentless determination – to cut through the mystery of the man he used to be. 

From Insomniac Games, the developers of the critically acclaimed Marvel’s Spider-Man franchise, comes Marvel’s Wolverine, an all-new take on an iconic character based on Marvel Comics. Developed in collaboration with Marvel Games and Sony Interactive Entertainment, Marvel’s Wolverine coming to PlayStation®5 consoles September 15, 2026.

description:
ALAPA (RUINS) follows a successful young man who returns home to rescue his mother from a life of poverty, only to be met with a shocking rejection, she refuses to acknowledge him as her son. Her denial unearths buried secrets, deep pain, and a past shaped by belief, silence, and sacrifice. When faith clashes with ideology, the truth is buried… and all that remains are RUINS.

title: $0 D. KUYT vs. $50 VIERI 🔥 FULL REVIEW
description:
$0 D. KUYT vs $50 VIERI… is the free daily login card actually competing with a potential $50 box striker?

00:00 Intro
02:21 Dirk Kuyt Player Build
03:14 Dirk Kuyt Team Selection
04:04 Dirk Kuyt In-Game Test
11:43 Dirk Kuyt Player Review
13:30 Christian Vieri Player Build
14:55 Christian Vieri vs Gabriel Batistuta Comparison

16:36 Christian Vieri In-Game Test

In this full review, I tested both players in real gameplay and break everything down for you:

⚡ Player leveling
🧪 Additional booster craftings
🧠 Recommended additional skills
🎮 In-game performance test
📊 Strengths & weaknesses
🔥 Final META verdict

Dirk Kuyt is completely FREE from daily login - and this is his first ever appearance. 

On the other side, Christian Vieri sits in a 50-player box with phenomenal finishing and serious striker presence.

Is Vieri worth the money?
Or is the free Kuyt the smarter option?

title: Fast & Furious 11 (2026) - First Trailer | Vin Diesel, Cristiano Ronaldo
description:
#FastAndFurious11 #VinDiesel #CristianoRonaldo

Family built the legend — and now it will decide the end.

Editing, Adobe Premiere, VFX, SFX, Thumbnail by ‪‪@USTrailerStudio‬ please subscribe for more:

🎥 Attention Viewers!

This video is a fan-made cinematic concept, created for artistic expression and entertainment only. Powered by AI innovations (Google Veo 3), professional-grade sound design, and visual storytelling, it reimagines what modern filmmaking can be.
Every frame was built with creativity and passion—no official affiliation, just pure imagination.
Enjoy the experience, share the vision, and let’s keep pushing the boundaries of what’s possible in film. 🍿🎬

🚗 FAST & FURIOUS 11

The ultimate showdown begins in FAST & FURIOUS 11 (2026) — where loyalty is tested, bloodlines collide, and the final game is set in motion. Dominic Toretto faces his most calculated and relentless opponent yet: the Elite Enforcer. What starts as a race becomes a war, and survival means more than speed.

In this explosive new chapter, family is no longer just strength — it’s a target. As alliances fracture and the canyon battlefield ignites, Dom must confront a force that matches him in discipline, precision, and brutality. With massive practical stunts, high-stakes action, and raw emotional intensity, this trailer delivers the most dangerous confrontation in the franchise’s history.

Will family win again… or has the game changed forever?

title: Prof BOF Reviews Epic VIERI–Phenomenal Finishing Is UNSTOPPABLE😳Should You Go For Him?🤔
description:
In this video, Prof BOF reviews Epic Christian Vieri in eFootball 26, and this card comes with the deadly Phenomenal Finishing special skill.

Does it actually make a difference in front of goal?

I tested:

✅ Finishing inside & outside the box
✅ Weak foot consistency
✅ Heading & physicality
✅ Positioning & attacking runs
✅ Gameplay proof of goals
✅ Comparison with top meta CFs

And let’s just say… Vieri was scoring EVERYTHING.

If you’re wondering whether this Epic card is worth building or starting over your current striker, this is the most complete Vieri review you’ll find.

Roblox Name: TheRealFoltyn

Insta: https://www.instagram.com/realfoltyn/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

title: [Official Trailer] รักครูเท่าโลกเลย Love you teacher #LoveYouTeacherSeries
description:
ชีวิตอันเงียบสงบของ “ครูพบเมฆ” (เพิร์ธ ธนพนธ์) ครูประถมหน้าดุ ผู้ไม่ถูกชะตากับเด็ก กำลังจะพังทลาย เมื่อ “ครูโซลาร์” (แซนต้า พงศภัค) แฟนหนุ่มผู้สดใส ประสบอุบัติเหตุจนสมองรีเซ็ต กลับไปเป็นเด็กเจ็ดขวบในร่างผู้ใหญ่แบบวันเว้นวัน! สถานการณ์ยิ่งชวนปั่นป่วน เมื่อ “ครูจี้” (เค เลิศสิทธิชัย) ครูประถมคนใหม่ เพื่อนเก่าในวัยเด็กของพบเมฆ ปรากฏตัวขึ้นในฐานะครูไฟแรงครบเครื่อง มาคอยเปรียบเทียบให้ชีวิตครูพบเมฆดูแย่ จน “ครูสดชื่น” (แซมมี่ ซาแมนท่า) รักษาการผู้อำนวยการโรงเรียน อดเป็นห่วงไม่ได้ว่า ทั้งชีวิตครูและความรักของครูพบเมฆจะยังไปรอดหรือไม่ ความรักครั้งนี้จะพังไม่เป็นท่า หรือจะกลายเป็นบทเรียนที่แสนอบอุ่นที่สุดในชีวิตของครูคนหนึ่งกัน! 

          มาเอาใจช่วยพวกเขากันได้ใน “รักครูเท่าโลกเลย LOVE YOU TEACHER” ทุกวันเสาร์ เวลา 20:30 น. ดูทีวี ช่อง GMM25 | ดูย้อนหลัง แอป oneD ที่เดียว เวลา 21:30 น. เริ่ม 14 มีนาคมนี้

กำกับซีรีส์ : จารุพัฒน์ กันนุลา

รายชื่อนักแสดง
เพิร์ธ ธนพนธ์ สุขุมพันธนาสาร รับบท พบเมฆ
แซนต้า พงศภัค อุดมโภชน์ รับบท โซลาร์
แซมมี่ ซาแมนท่า เมลานี่ โค้ทส์     รับบท  สดชื่น
เค เลิศสิทธิชัย                               รับบท  จี้

title: Fast & Furious 11 (2026) | Vin Diesel, Dwayne Johnson, Jason Statham | Concept Trailer
description:
#FastAndFurious11 #VinDiesel #dwaynejohnson #jasonstatham 

Watch the Fast & Furious 11 Fan-Made Concept Trailer

Vin Diesel, Dwayne Johnson, and Jason Statham coming back to be part of the same epic final chapter of the most high-octane film franchise in all of Hollywood's history, is an event that will bring to life the dreams of petrol heads, action fans, and die-hard Fast family fans around the globe since the day these three screen legends parted ways. Diesel's unbreakable portrayal of Dominic Toretto, Johnson's explosive, over-the-top, larger-than-life performance as Luke Hobbs, and Statham's icy, calculated, menacing take on Deckard Shaw create a holy trinity of on-screen power that is so overwhelming, that each and every second they spend together feels like it's made from the very best cinematic gold there is. Every single frame of this concept trailer pulsates with the raw horsepower, the unwavering family loyalty, and the stunning action-packed spectacle that has made this franchise one of the most beloved and unstoppable forces in movie history.

This concept vision for Fast & Furious 11 offers the kind of heart-pounding, jaw-dropping, and emotionally-charged finale that Dominic Toretto and the rest of the Fast Family deserve, whether it's racing at breakneck speed through the streets of the most treacherous cities on earth or embarking upon perilous globe-trotting missions that put every last member of the Fast Family to its maximum limit.

The reunion of these three legendary characters after the many years of on-screen and off-screen tension, and after being separated from one another for what may be decades, makes this the most-anticipated concept of 2026 — and sends the clearest message to Universal Studios that the Fast Family is only whole when every member returns!

Disclaimer:
THIS IS A FAN MADE CONCEPT TRAILER CREATED FOR ENTERTAINMENT AND CREATIVITY PURPOSES ONLY. THIS FAN PROJECT IS IN NO WAY AFFILIATED WITH, NOR ENDORSED BY, NOR OFFICIALLY ASSOCIATED WITH VIN DIESEL, DWAYNE JOHNSON, JASON STATHAM, UNIVERSAL PICTURES, OR ANY OTHER OFFICIAL FAST & FURIOUS PRODUCTION TEAM(S). ALL ORIGINAL CHARACTERS AND STORY RIGHTS ARE OWNED BY UNIVERSAL PICTURES AND THEIR RESPECTIVE COMPANIES AND RIGHTS HOLDERS.



Along with fan-made trailers, I also share movie reviews, news, and updates from the world of entertainment. Be sure to hit that subscribe button and stay updated on all the latest from my channel!

Join Bruno’s mailing list: https://drop.cobrand.com/d/BrunoMars/Subscribe

Connect with Bruno: 
https://www.tiktok.com/@brunomars
https://www.instagram.com/brunomars
https://www.youtube.com/brunomars
https://x.com/brunomars
https://www.facebook.com/brunomars

https://brunomars.com

Bruno Mars is a 16x GRAMMY®-winning global superstar, singer, songwriter, multi-instrumentalist, producer, and one of the most-streamed artists in the world. Known for his showmanship and chart-toppers, Bruno has set a number of records throughout his career, including becoming the first artist ever to hit 150 million monthly listeners on Spotify, appearing on two of the fastest songs to reach one billion streams (for “Die with a Smile” with Lady Gaga and “APT.” with ROSÉ, and achieving the highest-certified song in RIAA history with 2010’s “Just the Way You Are”). Since launching a string of hits beginning in 2009, Bruno has sold over 150 million records worldwide, making him one of the best-selling artists of all time. Beyond his work as a soloist, Bruno is a member of the duo Silk Sonic with Anderson .Paak. In addition to his 35 Billboard Hot 100 hits, including nine number one singles, Bruno is the recipient of 16 GRAMMY® Awards (including “Album of the Year” for 24K Magic), 14 American Music Awards, and seven MTV Video Music Awards. His 24K Magic World Tour was among the highest-grossing tours in history, and within the top ten highest-grossing of the 2010s.
